title: Restore correct max_trials behaviour for VF2Layout pass
notes: There is also quality aspect but compilation failure is taking precedence

title: Fix tracking of routing permutation in Sabre with disjoint backends
notes: Output circuit remain correct but metadata was wrong

title: Fix BreakLoopOp object has no attribute blocks bug
notes: transpilation raised an AttributeError because they have no blocks attribute

title: Fix 4-pi periodicity of controlled rotations in the CommutationChecker
notes: Computation checker incorrectly treated certain controlled rotations. It can enable unsafe gate reordering which will do  different quantum computation.

title: Fix ElidePermutations pass in the presence of PermutationGates
notes: the bug made the compiler produce correct circuit but metadata was wrong

title: Propagate DAGCircuit.name in ApplyLayout
notes: the compiled circuit is same but metadata was lost

title: Fix VF2PostLayout with uncoupled qubits in strict_direction=True
notes: VF2Layout with uncoupled-qubit metadata caused problems during later reconstruction.

title: Fix panic on 1.0 error in VF2Layout
notes: same problem of panic as above. The fix prevent the panic.

title: Fix VF2 layout allocation with idle qubits
notes: correct applied behavior but metadata problem

title: Fix reuse of ConsolidateBlocks instances
notes: the panic exception occurs. Transpilation fails instead of returning a circuit.

title: Fix composing virtual permutation layouts for ElidePermutations and StarPreRouting
notes: The PR is clearly saying remaining problem is the incorrect composition of the virtual final-layout metadata

title: Correctly combining control modifiers in OptimizeAnnotated
notes: OptimizeAnnotated did a problem when nested controlled operations had different control settings.

title: Use average gate fidelity in the commutation checker
notes: Commutation checker handled a very small-angle gate inconsistently.

title: Fix TranspileLayout.initial_index_layout with unordered virtuals
notes: again metadata problem

title: Fix deepcopy/pickle of DAGCircuit variable IO nodes
notes: When a DAGCircuit was loaded, some output nodes could be incorrectly treated as input nodes. This can damage the circuit’s structure, but there is no evidence that transpilation crashed.

title: Do not contract control-flow operations during SabreSwap
notes: SabreSwap removed dependencies that were important.Due to this, transpiled circuit could behave incorrectly.

title: Fix non-determinism in CommutativeCancellation
notes: CommulativeCancellation process items in random error so circuit graph is different each time. Circuit still worked correctly so issue not cathced.

title: Fix TemplateOptimization dropping the global_phase on substitution
notes: Qiskit strict test might detect bug or would dilebertaly ignore it.

title: Add 2q fractional gates to the ConsolidateBlocks transpiler pass
notes: Before the fix, ConsolidateBlocks could not optimize blocks containing 2-qubit fractional gates effectively. The compiled circuit remained semantically correct, but optimization quality could be worse (e.g., more gates or higher depth), making this a circuit-quality issue rather than a correctness bug

title: Reject loopback edges in CouplingMap
notes: Bad input created the problem. So the fix rejects bad input.

title: Fix CommutationChecker for controlled rotation gates
notes: circuit changes

title: Delegate BasePass.__call__ to PassManager.run
notes: alling ALAPScheduleAnalysis directly on a circuit failed

title: Fix non-determinism VF2Layout with only 1q gates
notes: VF2Layout gave different results each time with the same seed. The circuit was  correct, but output was not consistent

title: Fix BasisTranslator processing of nested ControlFlowOp
notes: BasisTranslator missed converting unsupported gates inside nested control-flow blocks. This could make final circuit fail on Aer.

title: Fix composition of final_layout
notes: Multiple routing steps produce incorrect metadata though Transpilation still worked correctly.

title: Added VF2PostLayout at the end of optimization stage for level 3
notes: Forced classification

title: Fix cache and prediction misses in Target::qargs
notes: Target qargs cache/prediction misses increase compile-time work; circuit result is unchanged.

title: Accept rotation gate names in CommutationChecker filters
notes: Rotation-gate names supplied to the CommutationChecker filter were not accepted, rejecting a valid transpiler configuration.

title: Fix incorrect global phase shift for P and U1 gates in CommutativeCancellation
notes: Incorrect phase shift for P/U1 cancellation changes only global phase.

title: Fix schedule analysis passes with empty circuits
notes: Schedule-analysis passes fail on an empty circuit.

title: Avoid panics in Optimize1qGatesDecomposition
notes: Optimizer panic during Optimize1qGatesDecomposition.

title: Fix pickling of SabreSwap
notes: SabreSwap pickling/serialization failure is an API-edge crash rather than a circuit-output defect.

title: Un-provide standard_operation for PyGate
notes: Treating a Python-defined gate as a standard operation can route it through the wrong operation representation.

title: Check target gates are parameterized in optimize1qgatesdecomposition
notes: Missing parameterization check can select a target gate that cannot represent the required one-qubit decomposition.

title: Raise exception not panic on bad ConsolidateBlocks input
notes: Bad ConsolidateBlocks input caused a panic; the fix replaces it with a controlled exception.

title: Read timing constraints from target when no backend is provided
notes: Scheduling with a Target but no backend fails to obtain timing constraints.

title: Fix global cache of SynthesizeRZRotations
notes: A global SynthesizeRZRotations cache can reuse stale synthesis state across runs or configurations.

title: Fix non-deterministic ConsolidateBlocks output with fixed transpiler seed
notes: ConsolidateBlocks produces varying output despite a fixed transpiler seed.

title: Preserve global phase in Commuting2qGateRouter
notes: Commuting2qGateRouter did not preserve the circuit global phase.

title: Fix excessive global-phase accumulation in UnrollForLoops
notes: UnrollForLoops accumulates global phase incorrectly.

title: Fix unsafe symmetric simplification of XXPlusYY in CommutativeOptimization
notes: Unsafe symmetric simplification of XXPlusYY can change the circuit unitary.

title: Fix cancellation of CS and CSdg in InverseCancellation
notes: CS and CSdg are inverse operations; failing to cancel them leaves an equivalent but unnecessarily larger circuit.

title: Fix forced ConsolidateBlocks decomposition for incomplete bases
notes: Forced ConsolidateBlocks decomposition against an incomplete basis can leave synthesis unable to produce a valid target decomposition.

title: Fix ParameterVector global-phase panic in RemoveIdentityEquivalent
notes: ParameterVector handling triggers a global-phase panic in RemoveIdentityEquivalent.

title: Fix commutation checking between two Pauli product measurements
notes: Incorrect commutation handling for Pauli-product measurements can reorder non-interchangeable measurement operations.

title: Fix synth_qft_line failure for circuits with 32 or more qubits
notes: synth_qft_line fails for circuits with 32 or more qubits.

title: Fix stale best-DAG update in C transpiler optimization level 3
notes: A stale best-DAG update can return an equivalent but non-best level-3 optimization result.

title: Fix matrix-size validation in CommutationChecker
notes: Invalid matrix sizes need validation in CommutationChecker rather than proceeding into a failure path.

title: Fix synth_clifford_depth_lnn for single-qubit Clifford circuits
notes: synth_clifford_depth_lnn fails for the single-qubit Clifford edge case.

title: Fix HLS qubit tracking for plugin-generated operations
notes: Incorrect qubit tracking for plugin-generated high-level-synthesis operations can apply operations to the wrong qubits.

title: Fix zero-length permutation synthesis overflow
notes: Zero-length permutation synthesis causes an arithmetic overflow.

title: Fix incorrect argument passed to generate_unroll_3q in Clifford+T transpilation
notes: Passing the wrong argument to the three-qubit unroll generator can synthesize an incorrect transformation.

title: Respect Target when selecting a non-default UnitarySynthesis plugin
notes: Ignoring the Target when selecting a non-default synthesis plugin can choose a less appropriate equivalent decomposition.

title: Fix control-flow qargs handling in BasisTranslator
notes: Incorrect control-flow qarg handling in BasisTranslator can translate operations on the wrong qubits.

title: Fix ConsolidateBlocks qubit mapping inside control-flow blocks
notes: Incorrect ConsolidateBlocks qubit mapping inside control-flow blocks changes the transformed operation mapping.

title: Fix DAG push-edge ordering non-determinism
notes: DAG push-edge ordering makes transpiler output non-deterministic.

title: Preserve registers through Python Layout to Rust TranspileLayout conversion
notes: Registers are lost while converting a Python Layout to Rust TranspileLayout; the layout-applied circuit behavior remains intact.

title: Fix global-phase handling in CommutativeCancellation
notes: CommutativeCancellation mishandles global phase.

title: Do not run VF2PostLayout when an explicit layout is supplied
notes: Running VF2PostLayout despite an explicit layout violates the requested layout contract while preserving the layout-applied circuit behavior.

title: Fix Target.py_instruction_supported behavior
notes: Target.py_instruction_supported reports the wrong support metadata/contract result.

title: Fix MCX dirty-ancilla qubit accounting in HLS selection
notes: Incorrect dirty-ancilla accounting can select an MCX realization with invalid ancilla use, affecting circuit behavior.

title: Fix CommutativeInverseCancellation for Clifford, control-flow, and non-invertible operations
notes: CommutativeInverseCancellation can act unsafely around Clifford, control-flow, or non-invertible operations.

title: Fix ApplyLayout with empty layout
notes: ApplyLayout fails when given an empty layout.

title: Fix HLS classical-bit mapping from control-flow blocks
notes: Incorrect classical-bit mapping from control-flow blocks changes how results are written or read.

title: Fix alignment checks of stretch variables
notes: Alignment checking with stretch variables reaches an invalid scheduling/checking path.

title: Fix subtraction-underflow panic in ConstrainedReschedule
notes: ConstrainedReschedule hits a subtraction-underflow panic.

title: Initialize ConstrainedReschedule.target unconditionally
notes: ConstrainedReschedule can use an uninitialized target and fail.

title: Fix ConstrainedReschedule barrier handling
notes: Barrier handling affects scheduling constraints/metadata rather than the layout-applied unitary; title alone leaves the exact manifestation borderline.

title: Add safe shape checking to synth_cz_depth_line_mr
notes: synth_cz_depth_line_mr needs safe shape validation to avoid an invalid-input failure.

title: Fix HighLevelSynthesis for custom gate calibrations
notes: Custom gate calibrations are transpiler contract metadata; preserving them does not change the logical output map.
